title: ComBees
description: Vanilla Minecraft's Bees in the style of Cobblemon's Combee
body:
--- This Resource Pack Requires the use of Optifine or ETF/EMF to Function ---



This resource pack modifies Vanilla Minecraft's bees to match the model of Cobblemon's Combee, while utilizing the Minecraft Bee's color scheme to maintain visual clarity.



Cobblemon's Combee Model was directly referenced, which is released under Creative Commons Public License
